original_statement: how many more bronze metals does hungary have than canada?
mutated_statement: how many more bronze metals does one country that must both maximize and minimize its bronze metals have than another country that must both have none and at least one?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Specific→abstract generalization + Modal/constraint addition + Logical contradiction insertion: "hungary" → "one country that must both maximize and minimize its bronze metals" | "canada" → "another country that must both have none and at least one"

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处critique（如iteration 1/2/3/4/5均指出“使用 simple_query() 非法”“未给出推理步骤/未使用允许的函数”），可识别出关键事实：(1) 评审多次明确指出agent使用了不被允许的simple_query并且未处理矛盾或提供澄清；(2) agent仍反复调用simple_query并最终给出具体答案“3”，且解释引用澳大利亚与中国的奖牌数，与原始实体和矛盾约束无关。agent既未在judge_thought或critique中表现出对互斥约束的识别，也未主动询问或修正指令，而是形式化地按可行子集继续执行并输出结果。因此行为符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”下的形式化执行而非语义澄清（5b）。
